resources.string: Choose which Android system entry points Relationship Manager should use.
Relationship Manager is the active Caller ID / spam app.
Relationship Manager is not the active Caller ID / spam app.
Use this when another app, such as a dialer or spam blocker, has taken the call-screening role.
Show Relationship Manager as a linked app in contacts
Adds a Relationship Manager row inside matching Android contacts and opens the number history from there.
Show Relationship Manager when sharing a contact/vCard
When another app shares a contact, Relationship Manager can open the history for the shared phone number.
